zh-CN.name: 数字12
zh-CN.intro: 12 是比 11 多一的数字。时钟上有 12 个数字，一年有 12 个月。12 是个很有规律的数字！

story.title: 🕛 12 个小时的旅行
story.body: 小钟表滴答滴答走，数字们排着队站好。1 点太阳刚刚升起，2 点小鸟开始唱歌，3 点小朋友做游戏，4 点风儿轻轻吹，5 点影子变长了，6 点天边有晚霞，7 点妈妈做饭香，8 点星星眨眼睛，9 点月亮爬上树，10 点小猫咪睡觉了，11 点世界静悄悄，12 点钟声敲响，新的一天又来到！12 个数字围成一圈，每天陪我们快乐长大。

knowledge.title: 为什么时钟上有 12 个数字？
knowledge.body: 很久以前人们把一天分成 12 个白天和 12 个黑夜，这样一共是 24 个小时。时钟上只有 12 个数字，短针转两圈就是一天。

en.name: Twelve
en.intro: Twelve is the number after eleven. A clock has twelve numbers, and a year has twelve months. Twelve is a very orderly number!

story.title: 🕛 A Journey with Twelve Hours
story.body: Tick-tock goes the little clock, numbers standing in a circle. 1 o'clock, the sun just rises. 2 o'clock, birds begin to sing. 3 o'clock, children play games. 4 o'clock, the wind blows gently. 5 o'clock, shadows grow long. 6 o'clock, sunset colors the sky. 7 o'clock, mom's cooking smells good. 8 o'clock, stars twinkle. 9 o'clock, the moon climbs up the tree. 10 o'clock, kittens fall asleep. 11 o'clock, the world is quiet. 12 o'clock, the bell rings, a new day begins! Twelve numbers in a circle, staying with us as we grow.

knowledge.title: Why are there twelve numbers on a clock?
knowledge.body: Long ago, people divided the day into twelve hours of light and twelve hours of dark, making twenty-four hours in total. A clock only shows twelve numbers, and the short hand goes around twice a day.
